name: kokonut-avatar-picker
title: Avatar Picker
author: kokonutUI
description: Collects an avatar choice and validated username through a compact, animated profile setup form.

changes: Renamed the exported component to AvatarPicker, made completion explicit, and added configurable labels and defaults while preserving the upstream avatar art and visual composition.
Replaced duplicate fixed SVG mask IDs with viewport-clipped artwork and generated a unique username field ID so multiple instances remain valid.
Changed the clickable container into a native form, added Enter submission, accessible error and counter associations, and meaningful selected-art semantics.
Made the thumbnail strip fit narrow viewports, gated hover-only movement to hover-capable devices, and disabled movement and transitions for reduced motion.
Changed application aliases to the bundled relative support closure and normalized formatting.
Changed the application utility alias to ../../lib/utils and normalized formatting without changing the component API or variants.
Changed the application utility alias to ../../lib/utils and normalized formatting without changing the card primitives.
Changed the application utility alias to ../../lib/utils and normalized formatting without changing the input API.
Normalized formatting and line endings without changing behavior.

license.scope: components/kokonutui/avatar-picker.tsx, components/ui/button.tsx, components/ui/card.tsx, components/ui/input.tsx, and lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Kept the upstream art and composition while making IDs instance-safe, submission real, copy configurable, narrow layouts stable, and motion accessible.
modifications.reason: The copied visual was strong, but fixed IDs, click-only submission, narrow overflow, and incomplete reduced-motion behavior prevented production use.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import and normalized formatting.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied dependency closure installable outside the upstream application.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import and normalized formatting.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied dependency closure installable outside the upstream application.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import and normalized formatting.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied dependency closure installable outside the upstream application.
Match the source batch formatting without changing the copied helper.
